text:
In this subtitle:

(1) “Board” means the board of the department.

(2) “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

(3) “Executive director” means the executive director of the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.001 — Definitions

In this subtitle:

    (1) “Board” means the board of the department.

    (2) “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

    (3) “Executive director” means the executive director of the department.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290 (H.B.2017), Sec. 33, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: “Board” means the board of the department.
“Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.
“Executive director” means the executive director of the department.
